text: Standing in this modern, slightly clinical museum or innovation space, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The starkly lit corridors and glass walls seem to separate realms of knowledge, inviting me to cross over into the unknown. The "R+D" wall speaks of evolution and coexistence with machines—a topic ripe for philosophical rumination. I am small amid these displays, yet my mind is wide open, eager to trace the connections between technology, humanity, and meaning.
